result.stdout:
Description:
  This application allows you to rerun an individual ArmoniK task locally. It reads the data in <path>, connects to a worker, and reruns the Task.

Usage:
  ArmoniK.TaskReRunner [options]

Options:
  --path <path>   Path to the JSON file containing the data needed to rerun the Task. [default: task.json]
  --force         Allow this program previous output deletion [default: False]
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
